gene_description: Transmembrane 6 superfamily member 2 — VLDL secretion, liver fat, and NAFLD fibrosis (E167K)

source.title: Exome-wide association study identifies a TM6SF2 variant that confers susceptibility to nonalcoholic fatty liver disease
source.finding: rs58542926 (E167K) T allele associates with higher liver fat, higher ALT, and lower LDL/TG; independent NAFLD signal from PNPLA3.

CC.effect: No E167K variant. Lower TM6SF2-associated hepatic steatosis genetic signal than T carriers.
CC.recommendation: Standard NAFLD prevention: diet, activity, metabolic control.

CT.effect: One copy of E167K (T). Associated with higher liver fat and fibrosis progression risk in biopsy cohorts, partly independent of BMI.
CT.recommendation: Reinforce weight and metabolic management; correlate with imaging/LFTs clinically.

TC.effect: One copy of E167K (T). Same interpretation as CT.
TC.recommendation: Reinforce weight and metabolic management; correlate with imaging/LFTs clinically.

TT.effect: Homozygous E167K. Greater association with advanced fibrosis/cirrhosis in NAFLD cohorts vs non-carriers.
TT.recommendation: Discuss hepatology/monitoring if NAFLD is suspected or liver enzymes are abnormal.
